bugs_fixed_this_cycle.description: Faction rep fallback defaulted to 0 (Hostile) instead of FACTION_SCORE_START (20, Neutral) in build_and_store_faction_context() and _apply_effect() reputation delta calculation.

Test test_pick_minigame_is_deterministic asserted hash-based determinism but function already uses randi(). Renamed to test_pick_minigame_returns_valid_member, now validates result membership over 10 calls.

features_added_this_cycle.description: MerlinWhisperSystem: 19 cryptic whispers triggered by hidden state (karma, tension, factions, trust tier, biome, milestones, promises). Trust-gated, no repeats per run, min 3-card gap.

overall_assessment: 16 total bugs fixed across 5 cycles (2 CRITICAL + 6 HIGH + 8 MEDIUM). First gameplay feature added: whisper system. Codebase clean and expanding.
